section.div: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
The job search that runs on your machine. AI job application framework built on Claude Code: evaluate postings, tailor CVs, write cover letters, prep interviews. Fork it and own it.
An AI-powered marketing platform that helps businesses generate content, automate campaigns, predict ROI, analyze competitors, and optimize growth using AI.
Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.
